mapper.sql: id, customer_id, label_id, create_by, updated_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: select * from customer_label_info where is_deleted = 0 and customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert:
insert into customer_label_info (customer_id, label_id, create_by, updated_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) values
(#{item.customerId}, #{item.labelId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.isDeleted})
